full_text:
Liang Xi (Ziyu) 梁習 (子虞)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Xi (梁習), styledZiyu (子虞), was born in Chen commandery. He pacified the Xiongnu and some of Bing, noted for good governance. Liang Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
